tr.td: Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg / 5 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
0.3 mg (1 mg/mL) IM every 15 minutes as needed
